required_skill_areas.cloud_platforms: Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS) and modern backend technologies (Python, TypeScript, Go)
required_skill_areas.data_engineering: Experience with data integrations, ETL pipelines, or enterprise data systems (S3, Snowflake, SharePoint, etc.) is a plus
required_skill_areas.pre_sales: Experience with customer-facing engineering roles (solutions engineering, professional services, or similar) is a plus

evidence.primary_role_motion: You will spend the majority of your time embedded with Hebbia’s most strategic customers, building the last mile of our platform for their specific workflows, data, and domain.
evidence.deployment_environment: Write production code that deploys through our CI/CD pipelines and meets our engineering standards
evidence.target_customer_industry: The AI platform for investors and bankers
evidence.ai_ml_depth: Build custom integrations, workflow automations, and domain-specific solutions on top of Hebbia’s platform
evidence.customer_engagement_depth: Return from engagements and work with engineering and product to generalize reusable patterns into platform capabilities
evidence.target_user_persona: The AI platform for investors and bankers
evidence.solution_customization_level: Build custom integrations, workflow automations, and domain-specific solutions on top of Hebbia’s platform
